element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Foundation for all subsequent level design
Required task to unlock exit warp in subsequent levels
Stepping sequence tasks that demand precision and rhythm
Resource-limited combat option for ranged enemy engagement
Awkwardly positioned obstacles that punish imprecision throughout game
Scripted high-speed momentum segments requiring timing and observation
Achievement of bonus level unlock (vertical pool diving challenge)

typical_relief_triggers: Safe platform landing after precision jump
Reaching checkpoint area with multiple exits
typical_tension_triggers: Appearance of awkwardly positioned spike clusters
Exit warp dependency on completion of multiple tasks
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Task-gated progression with punctuated difficulty spikes; levels feature mixed safe platforming interspersed with dangerous precision challenges and multi-stage task completion requirements

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Large levels contain hidden areas and paths; point thresholds unlock bonus vertical pool-diving levels

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction of basic platforming, hoop passing, and early spike hazards; establishes rhythm and combat mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of roller coaster sequences, platform disappearance timing puzzles, and increased spike density; multi-task exit warp requirements escalate
difficulty_curve.late_game: Intensified combination of all prior mechanics; awkwardly positioned spike clusters become more common; precision timing demands increase
notable_spikes: First appearance of instant-death spike clusters (creates shock learning moment)
Roller coaster sequences requiring observation and timing
Multi-stage task completion with time-sensitive platform disappearance

notable_level_patterns.description: Exit warp only reveals after player completes specific objectives: passing through hoops, stepping on platforms until they disappear, or riding roller coasters. Creates mid-level pacing gates that segment progression and force mastery demonstration
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Generic pattern applied across all 20 levels

notable_level_patterns.description: Awkwardly positioned spike clusters force player into precision platforming with zero-forgiveness positioning. Serves as primary difficulty escalator across world progression

Points collected during level completion trigger access to separate vertical bonus challenge (Genesis: diving pool; SNES: Mode 7 overworld navigation). Rewards skill-based point accumulation and extends replayability
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Available after scoring threshold in each level

notable_level_patterns.description: Scripted high-speed traversal segments requiring player to observe and time jumps or maneuvers during uncontrolled movement. Tests rhythm and prediction rather than direct control
